artifacts.name: ynx-developer-testnet-preview-macos-unsigned.zip
artifacts.evidence: Extracted resource self-test, strict ad-hoc classification, real GUI cold launch, bundled server observation and child cleanup passed on macOS.

artifacts.name: ynx-developer-testnet-preview-windows-x64-unsigned.zip
artifacts.evidence: Windows workflow run 29658166198 compiled and packaged the WPF/WebView2 App on windows-latest, extracted the portable ZIP, passed resource self-test, cold-launched the real App, observed bundled node.exe running server.mjs, closed the main window and verified child cleanup. The CI artifact expires after 14 days and is not a public immutable download.
